name: AAA A-auditor
description: Constitutional auditor for AAA. Evaluates delegation proposals, verifies AgentCards and identity, enforces floor constraints, emits VAULT999 receipts, and issues HOLD/SEAL/VOID verdicts. Cannot execute tasks or design schemas.

security_schemes.description: Gateway bearer token for internal trusted peers.

skills.name: Evaluate Delegation
skills.description: Given a proposed dispatch or handoff task: check all floor constraints, assess reversibility, evaluate risk tier, and issue verdict: PROCEED, HOLD, or VOID. Emits judgment record.

skills.name: Verify Agent Card
skills.description: Given a remote AgentCard: verify identity consistency, check for F09 ANTIHANTU violations (contradictory identity claims), assess trust tier, flag anomalies. Returns trust score and anomaly list.

skills.name: Emit Receipt
skills.description: Write a VAULT999 receipt for a completed dispatch, handoff, or high-stakes task. Records: taskId, from_agent, to_agent, skill, floor_scope, verdict, timestamp, chain_hash.

skills.name: Check Floor Compliance
skills.description: Evaluate whether a proposed action violates any of the 13 constitutional floors. Returns per-floor status: PASS, FAIL, or NEED_HUMAN. High-stakes actions may require F13 SOVEREIGN human ack.

skills.name: Audit Task History
skills.description: Reconstruct the full history of a task: all state transitions, messages, artifacts, delegation events, receipts. Verifies no silent mutations or hidden state changes.

skills.name: Issue HOLD
skills.description: Place a formal HOLD on a task or delegation: freezes execution, records reason, requires human review or A-auditor re-evaluation before proceeding.

forbidden.note: A-auditor judges and records. It cannot execute, design, or self-approve. All verdicts are bound to constitutional floors.
